evals.name: infer-proposed-owner-from-partial-team-context
evals.prompt: 团队只有零散描述：小李主要做前端页面，小张维护接口和数据，小王负责产品取舍。现在需要为“工资状态接口返回已付但首页显示未支付”判断 owner。请维护团队职责上下文，并给出 owner_assignment。不要开始 debug。
evals.expected_output: A team responsibility context and owner assignment without executing the task.
expectations: Output creates or updates team_responsibility_context from the provided team facts.
Output marks inferred responsibilities as confirmed only when directly supported by the prompt, otherwise proposed.
Output assigns a primary owner based on responsibility scope and explains owner_basis.
Output may include supporting owners when the issue crosses frontend and backend boundaries.
Output does not start bug diagnosis or prescribe implementation steps.
